questions.question: Describe the difference between a 'hard' disk drive and a solid-state drive. Provide one key feature that distinguishes each type of storage device.
questions.hint: Focus on the key features of both types of storage devices

questions.question: What is the purpose of the Boot Sector in an operating system? Explain its role in the boot process.
questions.hint: Focus on the role of the Boot Sector in the boot process

questions.question: What is Virtual Memory? Explain how it is created and how it differs from physical RAM.
questions.hint: Provide a detailed explanation of Virtual Memory, its creation, and its differences from physical RAM
